form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 312m in 18.57 last start, beating Territory Man. Likes the rails so expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fifth last time out over 312m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when second (18.35) at this track, making it two placings on end. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Deserves respect.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (18.32) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 1.5 lengths second. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion before missing the frame last time out, finishing sixth (18.73) at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and needs to find best form to feature.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 312m. Last start finished 3rd on April 12 over 312m at this track behind Territory Life beaten 2 lengths (18.36) in a Grade 4. Has clocked a sharp 18.22 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
